questions.question: What is the key difference between traditional AI tools and AI agents?
questions.questionHtml: What is the key difference between traditional AI tools and AI agents?

answers.text: AI agents are more expensive to use
answers.textHtml: AI agents are more expensive to use

answers.text: AI agents can take a goal, break it into steps, and execute those steps independently
answers.textHtml: AI agents can take a goal, break it into steps, and execute those steps independently

answers.text: AI agents only work with large enterprises
answers.textHtml: AI agents only work with large enterprises

answers.text: AI agents require custom software development to use
answers.textHtml: AI agents require custom software development to use

questions.feedback: AI agents go beyond question-and-answer interactions. They can take a goal (like 'process overdue invoices'), break it into steps, and execute those steps independently — making decisions along the way.
questions.feedbackHtml: AI agents go beyond question-and-answer interactions. They can take a goal (like 'process overdue invoices'), break it into steps, and execute those steps independently — making decisions along the way.

questions.question: What is the recommended approach for building AI capability in a small business team?
questions.questionHtml: What is the recommended approach for building AI capability in a small business team?

answers.text: Hire a full-time AI specialist
answers.textHtml: Hire a full-time AI specialist

answers.text: Outsource all AI work to consultants permanently
answers.textHtml: Outsource all AI work to consultants permanently

answers.text: A hybrid approach — train 1-2 champions, use a consultant for setup, then have champions train everyone else
answers.textHtml: A hybrid approach — train 1-2 champions, use a consultant for setup, then have champions train everyone else

answers.text: Wait until AI tools become easier to use before training anyone
answers.textHtml: Wait until AI tools become easier to use before training anyone

questions.feedback: The hybrid approach gives you instant expertise from a consultant, deep internal knowledge from training your champions, and sustainable capability through peer teaching — without the high cost of hiring or ongoing consultant dependency.
questions.feedbackHtml: The hybrid approach gives you instant expertise from a consultant, deep internal knowledge from training your champions, and sustainable capability through peer teaching — without the high cost of hiring or ongoing consultant dependency.

questions.question: Select ALL that apply: Which of the following are NZ-specific AI resources available to small businesses?
questions.questionHtml: Select ALL that apply: Which of the following are NZ-specific AI resources available to small businesses?

answers.text: AI Forum NZ free governance framework and e-learning modules
answers.textHtml: AI Forum NZ free governance framework and e-learning modules

answers.text: Government AI Advisory Pilot Programme with up to $15,000 co-funding
answers.textHtml: Government AI Advisory Pilot Programme with up to $15,000 co-funding

answers.text: Mandatory government AI certification for all businesses
answers.textHtml: Mandatory government AI certification for all businesses

answers.text: MBIE-funded AI workshops through regional chambers of commerce
answers.textHtml: MBIE-funded AI workshops through regional chambers of commerce

questions.feedback: NZ offers several practical AI resources including the AI Forum's free tools, government co-funding programmes, and regional workshops. There is no mandatory government AI certification — NZ takes a voluntary, principles-based approach.
questions.feedbackHtml: NZ offers several practical AI resources including the AI Forum's free tools, government co-funding programmes, and regional workshops. There is no mandatory government AI certification — NZ takes a voluntary, principles-based approach.

questions.question: In the 90-day AI action plan, what should you focus on during the first 30 days?
questions.questionHtml: In the 90-day AI action plan, what should you focus on during the first 30 days?

answers.text: Implement AI across all departments simultaneously
answers.textHtml: Implement AI across all departments simultaneously

answers.text: Pick one AI tool, use it for one task, and track the results
answers.textHtml: Pick one AI tool, use it for one task, and track the results

answers.text: Write a comprehensive AI strategy document
answers.textHtml: Write a comprehensive AI strategy document

answers.text: Deploy AI agents for end-to-end automation
answers.textHtml: Deploy AI agents for end-to-end automation

questions.feedback: The first 30 days are about building personal confidence with AI. Pick one tool, one task, and track your results. Starting small builds momentum and helps you understand how AI fits into your specific business.
questions.feedbackHtml: The first 30 days are about building personal confidence with AI. Pick one tool, one task, and track your results. Starting small builds momentum and helps you understand how AI fits into your specific business.

questions.question: Select ALL that apply: Which NZ industries are seeing significant AI adoption and innovation?
questions.questionHtml: Select ALL that apply: Which NZ industries are seeing significant AI adoption and innovation?

answers.text: Agriculture — with companies like Halter and Robotics Plus
answers.textHtml: Agriculture — with companies like Halter and Robotics Plus

answers.text: Professional services — with tools like LawHawk achieving 75% time reduction
answers.textHtml: Professional services — with tools like LawHawk achieving 75% time reduction

answers.text: Retail — with Foodstuffs achieving up to 90% food waste reduction using AI
answers.textHtml: Retail — with Foodstuffs achieving up to 90% food waste reduction using AI

answers.text: Trades — with NZ-built tools like Tradify and Fergus adding AI features
answers.textHtml: Trades — with NZ-built tools like Tradify and Fergus adding AI features

questions.feedback: All four industries are seeing significant AI adoption in NZ. Agriculture leads with world-class companies, professional services see dramatic time savings, retail is using AI for inventory and waste reduction, and trades have NZ-built AI tools specifically designed for them.
questions.feedbackHtml: All four industries are seeing significant AI adoption in NZ. Agriculture leads with world-class companies, professional services see dramatic time savings, retail is using AI for inventory and waste reduction, and trades have NZ-built AI tools specifically designed for them.

questions.question: What does protocol standardisation (MCP and A2A) mean for small businesses?
questions.questionHtml: What does protocol standardisation (MCP and A2A) mean for small businesses?

answers.text: Small businesses will need to build their own AI protocols
answers.textHtml: Small businesses will need to build their own AI protocols

answers.text: Different AI tools will be able to communicate and work together seamlessly
answers.textHtml: Different AI tools will be able to communicate and work together seamlessly

answers.text: Businesses will be locked into a single AI provider
answers.textHtml: Businesses will be locked into a single AI provider

answers.text: All AI tools will become free to use
answers.textHtml: All AI tools will become free to use

questions.feedback: Protocol standardisation (like Anthropic's MCP and Google's A2A) creates a common language so different AI tools can work together. This means your accounting AI will be able to talk to your inventory AI without you acting as the go-between.
questions.feedbackHtml: Protocol standardisation (like Anthropic's MCP and Google's A2A) creates a common language so different AI tools can work together. This means your accounting AI will be able to talk to your inventory AI without you acting as the go-between.

questions.question: What is the typical cost range for upskilling an employee in AI capabilities?
questions.questionHtml: What is the typical cost range for upskilling an employee in AI capabilities?

answers.text: $100-500 per person
answers.textHtml: $100-500 per person

answers.text: $1,200-3,000 per person
$50,000+ per person
answers.textHtml: $50,000+ per person

questions.feedback: AI upskilling typically costs $1,200-3,000 per employee. This preserves your team's institutional knowledge and can lead to a 40% reduction in consulting dependence — making it excellent value for small businesses.
questions.feedbackHtml: AI upskilling typically costs $1,200-3,000 per employee. This preserves your team's institutional knowledge and can lead to a 40% reduction in consulting dependence — making it excellent value for small businesses.

questions.question: Select ALL that apply: Which traits do businesses that successfully adopt AI share?
questions.questionHtml: Select ALL that apply: Which traits do businesses that successfully adopt AI share?

answers.text: They start small with one tool and one task
answers.textHtml: They start small with one tool and one task

answers.text: They measure results and track ROI
answers.textHtml: They measure results and track ROI

answers.text: They implement AI across all departments on day one
answers.textHtml: They implement AI across all departments on day one

answers.text: They involve their team and stay within the law
answers.textHtml: They involve their team and stay within the law

questions.feedback: Successful AI adopters share five traits: they start small, measure results, involve their team, stay within the law, and keep iterating. Trying to implement AI across all departments simultaneously is a common pitfall that leads to failure.
questions.feedbackHtml: Successful AI adopters share five traits: they start small, measure results, involve their team, stay within the law, and keep iterating. Trying to implement AI across all departments simultaneously is a common pitfall that leads to failure.
